name: Spicy Szechuan Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tbsp Cornstarch dissolved in 2 tbsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the tofu. Drain again.
2. Cut into 1-inch square pieces.
3. Heat a wok over high flame and spray with oil.
4. When hot, add ginger, garlic, and 2 tablespoons scallions. Cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add Szechuan hot bean paste and tofu. Stir gently.
6. Add tamari, salt, sugar, and stock. Bring to a full boil.
7. Thicken with cornstarch.
8. Add sesame oil, chili oil, and peppercorn powder.
9. Sprinkle with remaining scallions.
10. Serve with brown rice.
